name: Shrimp and Eggplant Casserole
recipeIngredient: Diced eggplant, peeled (4 cups or 1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook chopped onions, green bell pepper, celery, and diced eggplant in butter until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
2. Stir in crushed garlic cloves, remaining ingredients except bread crumbs; turn the mixture into a lightly buttered shallow 2-quart casserole.
3. Top with bread crumbs. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes.
